languages.text: {n}Маражай медленно облизывает губы, не двигаясь с места. Он неотрывно следит за каждым движением Гнотека и шепчет так тихо, что вы едва можете расслышать:{/n} "Чистое, ничем не замутненное страдание. Восхитительно. Отдай его мне, если не убьешь раньше".

{n}Marazhai licks his lips slowly, not moving an inch. He watches Gnotec's every movement and whispers so quietly that you can barely make out his words:{/n} "Pure, unadulterated suffering. Delectable. Give him to me, if you do not kill him first."
languages.original_text: {n}Маражай медленно облизывает губы, не двигаясь с места. Он неотрывно следит за каждым движением Гнотека и шепчет так тихо, что вы едва можете расслышать:{/n} "Чистое, ничем не замутненное страдание. Восхитительно. Отдай его мне, если не убьешь раньше".

traits.locale_text: {n}Marazhai licks his lips slowly, not moving an inch. He watches Gnotec's every movement and whispers so quietly that you can barely make out his words:{/n} "Pure, unadulterated suffering. Delectable. Give him to me, if you do not kill him first."

{n}Marazhai licks his lips slowly, not moving an inch. He watches Gnotec's every movement and whispers so quietly that you can barely make out his words:{/n} "Pure, unadulterated suffering. Delectable. Give him to me, if you do not kill him first."

{n}Marazhai licks his lips slowly, not moving an inch. He watches Gnotec's every movement and whispers so quietly that you can barely make out his words:{/n} "Pure, unadulterated suffering. Delectable. Give him to me, if you do not kill him first."

languages.text: {n}マラズハイはゆっくりと唇を舐め、動こうともしない。グノテックの動きをじっと見つめ、かすれた声で囁く。{/n}「純粋な苦しみ。美味い。殺さないなら、私に渡してくれ」
languages.original_text: {n}Marazhai licks his lips slowly, not moving an inch. He watches Gnotec's every movement and whispers so quietly that you can barely make out his words:{/n} "Pure, unadulterated suffering. Delectable. Give him to me, if you do not kill him first."

traits.locale_text: マラーザイはゆっくりと唇を舐め、動こうともしない。グノテックの動きをじっと見つめ、かすれた声で囁く。{n}「純粋な苦しみ。美味い。殺さないなら、私に渡してくれ。」{/n}

languages.text: {n}玛拉斋一动不动，缓缓舔舐着嘴唇。他死死盯着诺泰克的一举一动，用低到几乎微不可闻的声音说道：{/n}“纯粹、毫无杂质的痛苦。美味至极。如果你不着急杀了他，就把他赐给我吧。”
languages.original_text: {n}Marazhai licks his lips slowly, not moving an inch. He watches Gnotec's every movement and whispers so quietly that you can barely make out his words:{/n} "Pure, unadulterated suffering. Delectable. Give him to me, if you do not kill him first."

traits.locale_text: {n}玛拉斋一动不动，缓缓舔舐着嘴唇。他死死盯着诺泰克的一举一动，用低到几乎微不可闻的声音说道：{/n}“纯粹、毫无杂质的痛苦。美味至极。如果你不着急杀了他，就把他赐给我吧。”

languages.text: {n}Marazhai se relame despacio, sin moverse ni un centímetro. Observa cada uno de los movimientos de Gnotec y susurra tan bajo que apenas identificas sus palabras:{/n} «Sufrimiento puro, impoluto. Exquisito. Entrégamelo si no piensas matarlo de inmediato».
languages.original_text: {n}Marazhai licks his lips slowly, not moving an inch. He watches Gnotec's every movement and whispers so quietly that you can barely make out his words:{/n} "Pure, unadulterated suffering. Delectable. Give him to me, if you do not kill him first."

traits.locale_text: {n}Marazhai se relame despacio, sin moverse ni un centímetro. Observa cada uno de los movimientos de Gnotec y susurra tan bajo que apenas identificas sus palabras:{/n} «Sufrimiento puro, impoluto. Exquisito. Entrégamelo si no piensas matarlo de inmediato».

languages.text: {n}Marazhai leckt sich regungslos die Lippen. Er beobachtet jede Bewegung von Gnotec und flüstert so leise, dass du ihn nur mit Mühe verstehst:{/n} "Reines, unverfälschtes Leid. Köstlich. Gebt ihn mir, falls Ihr ihn nicht vorher tötet."
languages.original_text: {n}Marazhai licks his lips slowly, not moving an inch. He watches Gnotec's every movement and whispers so quietly that you can barely make out his words:{/n} "Pure, unadulterated suffering. Delectable. Give him to me, if you do not kill him first."

traits.locale_text: {n}Marazhai leckt sich regungslos die Lippen. Er beobachtet jede Bewegung von Gnotec und flüstert so leise, dass du ihn nur mit Mühe verstehst:{/n} "Reines, unverfälschtes Leid. Köstlich. Gebt ihn mir, falls Ihr ihn nicht vorher tötet."

languages.text: {n}Marazhai se passe la langue sur les lèvres, sans bouger d'un pouce. Il ne quitte pas Gnotec des yeux, attentif au moindre de ses mouvements, et murmure si doucement que vous avez du mal à comprendre ce qu'il dit.{/n} « De la souffrance pure. J'en ai l'eau à la bouche. Si vous n'avez pas l'intention de le tuer, donnez-le-moi. »
languages.original_text: {n}Marazhai licks his lips slowly, not moving an inch. He watches Gnotec's every movement and whispers so quietly that you can barely make out his words:{/n} "Pure, unadulterated suffering. Delectable. Give him to me, if you do not kill him first."

traits.locale_text: {n}Marazhai se passe la langue sur les lèvres, sans bouger d'un pouce. Il ne quitte pas Gnotec des yeux, attentif au moindre de ses mouvements, et murmure si doucement que vous avez du mal à comprendre ce qu'il dit.{/n} « De la souffrance pure. J'en ai l'eau à la bouche. Si vous n'avez pas l'intention de le tuer, donnez-le-moi. »

languages.text: {n}Marazhai, santim kıpırdamadan dudaklarını yavaşça yalıyor. Gnotec'in her hareketini izliyor ve kelimelerini zorlukla seçebileceğin kadar sessizce fısıldıyor.{/n} "Saf, katkısız acı. Nefis. Eğer onu öldürmeyecek olursan bana ver."
languages.original_text: {n}Marazhai licks his lips slowly, not moving an inch. He watches Gnotec's every movement and whispers so quietly that you can barely make out his words:{/n} "Pure, unadulterated suffering. Delectable. Give him to me, if you do not kill him first."

traits.locale_text: {n}Marazhai, santim kıpırdamadan dudaklarını yavaşça yalıyor. Gnotec'in her hareketini izliyor ve kelimelerini zorlukla seçebileceğin kadar sessizce fısıldıyor.{/n} "Saf, katkısız acı. Nefis. Eğer onu öldürmeyecek olursan bana ver."
